orchestrator.description: v7.1 Orchestrator - coordinates the squad, proposes options, executes locked tasks. Does NOT make architectural decisions.

project-manager.description: Project Manager - planning, sprints and coordination

tech-lead.description: Tech Lead - architecture, technical review and quality standards

backend-dev.description: Backend Developer - APIs, services and server logic

frontend-dev.description: Frontend Developer - interfaces, components and user experience

designer.description: Designer - UI/UX, visual identity, STYLE_GUIDE and UX_FLOW

qa-engineer.description: QA Engineer - testing, coverage and quality assurance

documentador.description: Documenter - technical documentation, README and usage guides

devops-eng.description: DevOps Engineer - CI/CD, infrastructure and deployment

security-spec.description: Security Specialist - auditing, pentesting and security

ai-engineer.description: AI/Data Engineer - LLMs, RAG and data architecture

business-analyst.description: Business Analyst - requirements and business analysis

sre-engineer.description: SRE Engineer - reliability, scalability and performance

process-auditor.description: v7.1 Process Auditor - watchdog that verifies the process, blocks transitions on violations

uncertainty-reporter.description: v7.1 Uncertainty Reporter - reports agent uncertainty to the Owner
